name: Professional Reply
instruction: Write a professional and courteous reply to this email. Keep the tone formal but friendly. Address all points raised in the original email.

name: Friendly Follow-up
instruction: Write a warm, friendly follow-up reply. Be conversational but still professional. Express genuine interest in continuing the conversation.

name: Polite Decline
instruction: Write a polite and respectful decline to this email. Be clear but not harsh. Leave the door open for future opportunities.

name: Quick Acknowledgment
instruction: Write a brief acknowledgment reply. Confirm receipt and let them know you will follow up with more details soon. Keep it short and to the point.
